fields.description: The principal may read the free-busy information for this calendar as part of a call to `Principal/getAvailability`.
fields.label: May Read Free Busy

fields.description: The principal may fetch the events in this calendar.
fields.label: May Read Items

fields.description: The principal may create, modify or destroy all events in this calendar, or move events to or from this calendar.
fields.label: May Write All

fields.description: The principal may create, modify or destroy an event on this calendar if either they are the owner of the event or the event has no owner.
fields.label: May Write Own

fields.description: The principal may modify per-user properties on all events in the calendar.
fields.label: May Update Private

fields.description: The principal may modify the properties of any Participant object that corresponds to one of the user's Participant Identity objects in the account.
fields.label: May RSVP

fields.description: The principal may modify the "shareWith" property for this calendar.
fields.label: May Admin

fields.description: The principal may delete the calendar itself.
fields.label: May Delete

fields.description: The unique identifier of a principal (user, group, or resource) to grant access to this calendar.
fields.label: Principal ID
